shadowArena.title: The Veil Trial
shadowArena.description: A masked opponent challenges you in the Shadow Arena. Do you fight from darkness or reveal your face?

choices.text: Strike from the shadows — conceal your identity
choices.outcome: You land a decisive blow. Your shadow reputation grows.

choices.text: Step into the light — fight with honour
choices.outcome: Your boldness earns the crowd's respect. Join bonus unlocked.

choices.text: Negotiate — turn the duel into an alliance
choices.outcome: Clever. The opponent becomes a temporary ally. Prophecy scroll found.

shadowArena.title: The Black Tiger Gauntlet
shadowArena.description: The arena master offers you a Black Tiger promotion contract. Requires you to defeat three shadow-rank challengers in succession.

choices.text: Accept the gauntlet — claim the Black Tiger rank
choices.outcome: You survive all three. Black Tiger I rank achieved.

choices.text: Decline — train further before claiming the rank
choices.outcome: Wise restraint. XP training bonus applied.

shadowArena.title: The Cipher Duel
shadowArena.description: Your opponent in the arena carries a forbidden codex. Defeat them to claim it.

choices.text: Challenge them for the codex
choices.outcome: Victory. Cipher Codex Vol. II unlocked.

choices.text: Let them keep it — observe their style instead
choices.outcome: You learn more by watching. Bonus XP for next scenario.

kingdomRaid.title: The First Gate
kingdomRaid.description: Your faction prepares to raid the rival kingdom. You must choose your entry strategy.

choices.text: Breach the northern gate — overwhelming force
choices.outcome: The gate falls. Revenue vault captured: +$47 mock revenue.

choices.text: Infiltrate through the merchant quarter — stealth
choices.outcome: Undetected entry. Codex fragment recovered.

choices.text: Send a parley — attempt diplomatic conquest
choices.outcome: Kingdom submits without bloodshed. Join count +3.

kingdomRaid.title: The Treasure Vault
kingdomRaid.description: Inside the kingdom you find the vault. A guardian stands between you and the faction treasury.

choices.text: Fight the guardian directly
choices.outcome: Guardian defeated. Full vault looted: +$120 mock revenue.

choices.text: Use the Cipher Codex to unlock the vault — bypass the guardian
choices.outcome: Vault opened silently. Revenue +$90, codex fragment recovered.

hydraLabyrinth.title: The Hydra's First Eye
hydraLabyrinth.description: Deep in the Hydra Labyrinth, the Crown Eye activates. You must answer its question to proceed.

choices.text: I seek power through discipline
choices.outcome: The Crown Eye accepts. Scarlet alignment bonus.

choices.text: I seek power through shadow
choices.outcome: The Crown Eye approves. Serpent alignment bonus.

choices.text: I seek transformation beyond power
choices.outcome: The Crown Eye glows green. Void alignment detected.

hydraLabyrinth.title: The Commerce Eye
hydraLabyrinth.description: The Commerce Eye of the Hydra offers you a product ladder choice. Which pack do you carry into the next level?

choices.text: Shadow Moon Prompt Pack ($9 tier)
choices.outcome: Prompt Pack unlocked. Mock sale logged: +$9.

choices.text: Initiate Founders Pack ($27 tier)
choices.outcome: Founders Pack unlocked. Mock sale logged: +$27.

choices.text: Codex Vault Membership ($47/mo)
choices.outcome: Vault access granted. Mock recurring revenue: +$47/mo.

hydraLabyrinth.title: The White Tiger Gate
hydraLabyrinth.description: At the Labyrinth's deepest gate, the White Tiger spirit appears. Only the most disciplined may pass.

choices.text: Bow and request passage
choices.outcome: The Tiger honours your humility. White Tiger I rank granted.

choices.text: Challenge the Tiger — prove your worth
choices.outcome: The Tiger tests you for three days. White Tiger II rank granted to the worthy.
